## Claim and safety boundaries

- [ ] No native compaction is implied without a real Codex lifecycle receipt
- [ ] Tokens, usage proxy, API-equivalent cost, and Codex credits remain separate
- [ ] Security/privacy documentation was updated if a persistence boundary changed
- [ ] Benchmark changes identify metric, fixture/evaluator, and negative controls
- [ ] No transcript, credential, account ID, or private absolute path is included
